arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim strikes confident tone despite woeful Man Utd form ahead of huge Newcastle clash
arts.sum: Manchester United head coach Ruben Amorim delivered an upbeat message to supporters ahead of his side's year-ending Premier League clash with Newcastle.

arts.ttl: Revealed: Newcastle favourites to seal quality transfer for just €38m this January
arts.sum: Newcastle United are looking in a strong position to clinch the potential transfer of AC Milan defender Fikayo Tomori this January, CaughtOffside understands. The former Chelsea defender is understood to be keen on a potential return to the Premier League, and Newcastle are looking into his situation as his Milan future looks in major doubt. arts.ttl: Man Utd vs Newcastle Prediction: Team News, Predicted Lineups and Where To Watch
arts.sum: Manchester United will be hoping to end a run of three successive defeats when they host an in-form Newcastle at Old Trafford on Monday evening. Ahead of the match, we’ve made our score pred...

arts.ttl: Full list of 82 Premier League stars free to talk to clubs on January 1 including Mo Salah
arts.sum: The January transfer window opens on Wednesday and Mo Salah, like two of his Liverpool team-mates, Virgil van Dijk and Trent Alexander-Arnold, will be able to sign a pre-contract agreement with another club
Footy Headlines can leak the main colorway of Manchester United Football Club's 2025-26 goalkeeper kit in Pro version.

arts.ttl: I'm a Manchester United fan and Newcastle United 'worry me' as they visit Old Trafford
arts.sum: While Man United are struggling to find their form under the new manager with players lacking that spark, Newcastle's stars have found their feet with Alexander Isak hitting 10 in his last 10 league games, Anthony Gordon looking like his old self but it is the midfield trio of Bruno Guimaraes, Joelinton and a certain Italian that has caught the eye. Throw in the fact that two of United's most influential players, Bruno Fernandes and Manuel Ugarte are missing on Monday night due to suspension, it's perhaps no surprise that Man United fans are a feeling a little cautious about the clash - even if Newcastle have just won twice at Old Trafford in the last 50-odd years.

arts.ttl: Harry Maguire makes 'frustrated' admission in verdict on Man Utd boss Ruben Amorim
arts.sum: Manchester United have failed to hit the ground running under Ruben Amorim since the Portuguese boss arrived at Old Trafford but Harry Maguire has faith the coach can find success

arts.ttl: Newcastle United predicted line-up vs Man United as Howe set for one key change
arts.sum: Newcastle United predicted line-up vs Man United: Dubravka; Livramento, Schar, Burn, Hall; Tonali, Guimaraes, Joelinton; Murphy, Gordon, Isak. Eleswhere, while Willock and Sean Longstaff are strong options if Howe wants to rotate his midfield, Newcastle are likely to continue with the impressive trio of Tonali, Bruno and Joelinton, while the in-form Alexander Isak will again lead the line.

arts.ttl: Eddie Howe has just solved Newcastle United problem Manchester United are still struggling with
arts.sum: "Early season there was chopping and changing because I wasn’t liking what I was seeing," Howe told reporters before the clash with Manchester United. Eddie Howe takes his Newcastle United side to Old Trafford on Monday evening knowing his starting XI all but picks himself.

arts.ttl: 'Excitement' - Eddie Howe makes ambitious statement ahead of Manchester United vs Newcastle
arts.sum: Man Utd play Newcastle in the Premier League on Monday and Eddie Howe is hopeful of an away victory.
